data.content: ESCALATION: Architect-Agent scored 6.4/10 after 4 attempts — pipeline halted, user intervention required

Quality eval for Architect-Agent: 6.4/10 → FAIL. The ADR is well-structured and contextually grounded (152-FZ, 54-FZ, PAT-001/PAT-002 compliance), but it falls short of the full Architect deliverable in three critical areas:

Step scored 7/10 (below 8.5) — retrying (attempt 2/4). Feedback: Strong ADR with solid legal/compliance framing (152-FZ, 54-FZ, LYL-9 gate) and good alignment to existing stack patterns (PAT-001/PAT-002, SWR, Sonner). However, the output falls short of the full Arc
